<!-- wp:divi/text {"content":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"\u003cp\u003eAmelia is a multidisciplinary visual designer driven by curiosity, emotion, and precision. Her design process focuses on creating clarity through color, typography, and spatial rhythm—balancing beauty with purpose in every composition.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eOver the past several years, Amelia has collaborated with startups, agencies, and independent creators to build visual languages that communicate personality and trust.
